experience.description:
• Led a team of many as 30+ digital artists to deliver high-quality output at high efficiency that end customers across the globe can enjoy, and to help them unlock their full potential. With her guidance, the team is able to exceed the organization's productivity and quality benchmark by ~5% month on month.

• Led an adhoc team of three artists to deliver a high-quality product visualization video 50% faster than the industry standard (14 days vs. 30+ days).

• At present, drives art direction for Design Operations Team, collaborating with 3D designers and content generators. Ginny provides detailed creative input and leads live editing sessions that enable high-quality output that are seen in Amazon’s different marketplaces.

• Leverages AI to solve persistent organizational concerns by creating tools like a design-to-email HTML plugin, resource management platform, workload tracking application, audit flag Photoshop plugin, and more.
 • Leads the business review team of Content Generation Hub, providing narratives that give business leaders the right level of information to make decisions.
 • Leads the marketing department of the Mental Health and Wellbeing affinity group in the Philippines, designs the team's promotional materials, and writes the communications sent out.
Designed end-to-end experiences for web and mobile products, collaborating closely with engineering and product teams.
Created brand identities, marketing materials, and digital interfaces for a variety of clients.
